Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $93,549,650Details
International Box Office $114,305,297
Worldwide Box Office $207,854,947
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,417,046
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,852,721
Total $8,269,767
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic, but things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$37,205,784 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,855 opening theaters/3,856 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $102,271,826

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 31st, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
March 31st, 2023 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 2nd, 2023 (Wide), released as Dungeons & Dragons: Ehre Unter Dieben (Germany)
March 29th, 2023 (Wide), released as Dungeons & Dragons — L’onore dei ladri (Italy)
March 29th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
March 29th, 2023 (Wide), released as Calabozos & Dragones: Honor Entre Ladrones (Colombia)
March 29th, 2023 (Wide), released as Calabozos & Dragones: Honor Entre Ladrones (Panama)
Video Release: May 2nd, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for fantasy action/violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2773 (cert #53662), 3/8/2023)
Running Time: 134 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Filming location (country): United Kingdom
Plot point: Dragon, Good vs. Evil
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Hasbro Studios, Entertainment One, Paramount Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
